title: One hundred ninety-eight new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta July 16-22
summary: During the week of July 16-22, YKHC reports one new in-region hospitalization, one medevac and 198 new cases of COVID-19 in the YK Delta. One In-Region Hospitalization YKHC reports that one COVID-19 positive individual was admitted into the Yukon-Kuskokwim Delta Regional Hospital. This is the 161st...

title: Monthly Manager’s Report
summary: July 12, 2022 SUMMARY Good afternoon! The summer season is in full swing, and the Kenai Peninsula is once again buzzing with activity! I hope all of you are taking advantage of what is turning out to be a beautiful summer. Although, the recent rain has been a welcome sight! These Alaskan summers go by too quickly so please enjoy it while it lasts. Additionally, I hope everyone enjoyed a safe, fun-filled, Independence Day with family and friends. Last month was yet again another busy month, consisting of various business meetings including the Cooperative Finance Corporation (CFC) Forum 2022 in Boston. The following are brief updates on many of HEA’s current business activities and strategic goals. SAFETY Employees continue to...
